positive: A symmetrical, circular celestial mandala design featuring bioluminescent flora and cosmic nebulae. The central elements are highly stylized, interconnected vines and geometric constellations rendered in deep indigo, luminous teal, gold foil accents, and crisp cream white. The composition must maintain a strong central focal point, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast for textile printing. Incorporate abstract, flowing cosmic dust patterns that frame the botanical elements, giving a sense of depth without losing graphic clarity. Use an Art Nouveau influence mixed with futuristic, symmetrical sacred geometry. Ink style, vector quality, smooth lines, highly detailed, high contrast, print-ready, minimalist complexity.
negative: blurry, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, logos, signature, noisy, oversaturated, low quality, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
